title: Release Reconciliation, Incident Response, and Production Defense · Runtime Contract: Feed Go Stakeholder Defense

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Predict Feed Go Stakeholder Defense · Theory Feed Go Stakeholder Defense
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go team handles case 4375 during a PostgreSQL claim and failover drill. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only.
